title: Remove K Digits
hints: To minimize the number, prioritize smaller digits at the most significant positions. Consider what happens when a digit is larger than the one following it.
Use a stack to build the result. Iterate through digits, popping larger previous digits from the stack until you have removed k digits or the stack is empty.
After processing all digits, if removals remain, truncate the end of the stack. Finally, strip leading zeros and handle the empty case by returning '0'.
